Registry / Terms / ancillary device

ancillary device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00372 · 23 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 20 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

19 distinct definitions across 23 publications. 4 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
a device associated with the instrument which is intended to perform a specific function, e.g. a repeat indication device, ticket printer, card reader, data input terminal, etc.
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20101998OIML R 125:1998T.9.101624pending
202X1998OIML R 125:1998T.9.101624pending
2 identical202X
device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results [OIML V1:2013, 5.06]
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
202X2018OIML R139-1:20183.2.602860pending
202X2012OIML R046-1:20122.1.1902298-R046-1pending
2 identical2010202X
device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying results
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20102007OIML R 35-1:20072.2.600372pending
202X2007OIML R 35-1:20072.2.600372pending
2 identical2010202X
device, other than the main indicating device, connected to a calculator, intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results Main ancillary devices are: - repeating indicating device; - printing device; - memory device; - totalizing indicating device; - conversion device.
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20102007OIML R 140:2007T.1.502045pending
202X2007OIML R 140:2007T.1.502045pending

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102008OIML R 85-1:20083.302301
- - - - device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results. Examples: repeating indicating device; printing device; memory device; conversion device.
pending
20102006OIML R 49-1:20062.1.8 T00418
( ( ( ( ( ( ( ( device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement to results. nat he main ancillary devices are: a) zero setting device; b) price indicating device; c) repeating indicating device; d) printing device; e) memory device; f) tariff control device; g) pre-setting device; and h) self service device
pending

a device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, memorizing, transmitting or displaying the measurement result
pending
202X1998OIML R 81:19983.901018
a device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, memorizing, transmitting or displaying the measurement result. Examples are a printing device or a remote indicator.
pending

d c b a device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results. he main ancillary devices are: ) repeating indicating device; ) printing device; ) memory device; and ) communication device

device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results

device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results [VIML 5.06]
pending
202X2009OIML R 80-1:20092.302242-R080-1
device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results Examples of ancillary devices: zero setting device; repeating indicating device; printing device; memory device; price indicating device; conversion device.
pending
20102007OIML R 139:2007T.1.501993
device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results Main ancillary devices are: - zero setting device; - repeating indicating device; - printing device; - memory device; - price indicating device; - totalizing indicating device; - pre-setting device; - self-service device.
pending
202X2012OIML R137:20123.1.802653
device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results The main ancillary devices are: repeating indicating device, printing device, memory device, and communication device.
pending
202X2017OIML R080-2:2017202857
Device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results. Examples of ancillary devices: zero setting device; repeating indicating device; printing device; memory device; price indicating device; conversion device.
pending
202X02301-1
device intended to perform a particular function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measurement results. Examples: repeating indicating device; printing device; memory device; conversion device.
pending
202X2024OIML R049-1:20243.1.802347-R049-1
device intended to perform a specific function, directly involved in elaborating, transmitting or displaying measured values
